Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of California Department Of State Hospitals Dolly Matteucci And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. PATRICK R. CO, ESQ. of the Co Law Firm APC, Tel No. 415-426-3553 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Deputy Attorney General DAVID PAI of the State of California Office of the Attorney General, Tel No. 510-622-2148 appearing for Defendant California Department of State Hospitals.

RULING - Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN REG'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of California Department Of State Hospitals' Dolly Matteucci is granted. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
